title: Image J Nerve Density Percentage Analysis
author: Elizabeth Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beh4jb8w

steps.title: File>Open>Locate desired image file>Click desired individual image (JPEG or TIFF)
steps.instruction: File>Open>Locate desired image file>Click desired individual image (JPEG or TIFF)

steps.title: Remove over exposed areas, scale bar etc
steps.instruction: Remove over exposed areas, scale bar etc. by clicking on desired shape in Shape Tool Bar under File Tool Bar.

steps.title: Move both slider bars to the far right
steps.instruction: Move both slider bars to the far right. Slowly move the top slider bar to the left until you just fill in the areas of interest with "red". The percentage that appears under the histogram is the percentage of area filled. That is the nerve density percentage.

steps.title: Reset the threshold slider bars as many times as desired
steps.instruction: Reset the threshold slider bars as many times as desired. Typically, three data points which are then averaged.
